name.en-US: ERS-Display-CO2-Lite Elsys LoRaWAN CO₂ Lite Display Room Sensor
name.pt-BR: ERS-Display-CO2-Lite Sensor de Ambiente CO₂ Lite com Display LoRaWAN Elsys

description.en-US: Elsys ERS-Display-CO2-Lite — LoRaWAN (Class A) indoor sensor that monitors temperature, humidity and CO₂. Uplinks are Elsys TLV frames on FPort 5.
description.pt-BR: Elsys ERS-Display-CO2-Lite — sensor LoRaWAN (Classe A) de ambiente interno que monitora temperatura, umidade e CO₂. Os uplinks são quadros TLV Elsys no FPort 5.
